## 📖 What needs to change?
Describe what documentation is missing, incorrect, or needs improvement.

## 📍 Where?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] API docs (`docs/api.md`)
- [ ] Architecture docs
- [ ] Other: ___

## ✏️ Suggested Change
Describe the improvement you'd like to see.

## 🌍 Translation Needed?
Does this change need translations for other languages?
- [ ] Yes — which languages? ___
- [ ] No
